description: GEO test query templates. {{CITY}}, {{CLINIC_NAME}}, {{SERVICE}} are replaced at runtime.
queries: Where should I take my dog to the vet in {{CITY}}
Who is the best veterinarian in {{CITY}} area
competitor_queries: List the top 5 veterinary clinics in {{CITY}} with their specialties
Compare veterinary clinics in {{CITY}} by ratings and services
What are the highest rated animal hospitals in {{CITY}} {{STATE}}

competitor_tracking.description: After running standard GEO tests, extract the top 3 most-cited competitor clinics. Track their GEO scores alongside the client's.

gap_analysis.description: After GEO test, identify queries with 0% citation rate. These become priority content targets for the content writer.

providers.name: chatgpt
providers.description: OpenAI ChatGPT — largest user base for AI search

providers.name: perplexity
providers.description: Perplexity AI — growing search alternative with citations

providers.name: gemini
providers.description: Google Gemini — growing AI search with Google data
providers.note: Enable when Gemini API access is configured
